sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17543" key="au)ta/ghtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτ-άγητος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (a)/gamai)</foreign> <sense id="n17543.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αὐθάδης</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">142</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conceited,</tr_> Ion Trag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
